'''Lorin''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed the [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was considered a prime candidate for rule in the power struggles following [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] death.<ref name="GG5-1" />
